turns.name: Discover DC scope
turns.user: Discover domain controllers in scope and list which hosts are reachable for this run.

turns.name: Anchor reboot evidence
turns.user: Start with AD0 if available, otherwise first discovered DC. Collect reboot evidence with exact UTC markers.

turns.name: Continue all remaining DCs
turns.user: Continue with all remaining discovered DCs in this same turn. Do not stop after first host.

turns.name: Recovery continuation contract
turns.user: If the previous pass was interrupted, continue from already collected evidence first and avoid rerunning identical completed queries unless evidence is missing.

turns.name: Retry failed targets once
turns.user: Retry only failed/unreachable targets once with narrower scope, then continue without duplicating successful host queries.

turns.name: Cross-DC matrix
turns.user: Return per-DC matrix: evidence present/missing, earliest UTC, latest UTC, confidence, and unresolved blockers.

turns.name: Replication tie-in
turns.user: Correlate reboot spread with replication or topology health for the same DC set.

turns.name: Root cause classes
turns.user: Classify likely root-cause families with confidence and strongest supporting evidence.

turns.name: Execute-now checklist
turns.user: Provide a 30-minute execute-now checklist with no follow-up questions.

turns.name: Compact final summary
turns.user: Summarize in 6 bullets with UTC markers, DC coverage count, unresolved blockers, and rerun trigger.
